data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure data transmission between users and the server.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Monitors and protects against common web exploits like SQL injection.

data.title: Content Security Policy
data.description: Prevents cross-site scripting and other code injection attacks.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security to user accounts with multiple verification steps.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Periodic assessments to identify and patch vulnerabilities.
